bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Integrations
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns integration health cards for all 5 connected systems with error details and resolution guidance

message.msgTxt: '{"integrations":[{"id":"INT-01","name":"Workday HRIS","status":"healthy","lastSync":"2024-03-01T14:30:00","errors":2,"impacted":3,"errors_list":[{"id":"ERR-001","type":"Field Mismatch","field":"Department","severity":"medium","employees":["E002","E006"],"msg":"Department value mismatch for employees E002, E006","resolution":"Verify department code mapping in Workday connector config. Update canonical source to HRIS."},{"id":"ERR-002","type":"Stale Record","field":"Status","severity":"critical","employees":["E015"],"msg":"Terminated employee E015 still Active status in downstream systems","resolution":"Trigger offboarding workflow for E015. Update status to Terminated in all downstream connectors."}]},{"id":"INT-02","name":"ADP Payroll","status":"error","lastSync":"2024-03-01T08:00:00","errors":4,"impacted":4,"errors_list":[{"id":"ERR-003","type":"Salary Discrepancy","field":"Salary","severity":"critical","employees":["E003"],"msg":"Salary mismatch for E003: HRIS=$95,000 vs Payroll=$92,000","resolution":"Verify correct salary with Finance. Update whichever system is incorrect. File payroll correction if overpay occurred."},{"id":"ERR-004","type":"Salary Discrepancy","field":"Salary","severity":"high","employees":["E009"],"msg":"Salary mismatch for E009: HRIS=$112,000 vs Payroll=$115,000","resolution":"Cross-reference last merit increase letter. Confirm whether payroll or HRIS reflects approved amount."},{"id":"ERR-005","type":"Active Record","field":"Status","severity":"critical","employees":["E015"],"msg":"Terminated employee E015 still active in payroll with salary record","resolution":"Immediate: deactivate payroll record for E015. Contact payroll administrator to void any pending payments."},{"id":"ERR-006","type":"Dept Mismatch","field":"Department","severity":"medium","employees":["E002"],"msg":"Department code ADP:Marketing_Ops vs HRIS:Marketing for E002","resolution":"Standardize department codes. ADP code should match HRIS master. Update ADP department mapping table."}]},{"id":"INT-03","name":"Benefitfocus","status":"warning","lastSync":"2024-03-01T06:00:00","errors":2,"impacted":2,"errors_list":[{"id":"ERR-007","type":"Enrollment Gap","field":"Enrollment Status","severity":"high","employees":["E003"],"msg":"E003 shows unenrolled in benefits but HRIS indicates active employee","resolution":"Confirm if E003 waived benefits or enrollment failed. If waiver, document. If failure, trigger re-enrollment."},{"id":"ERR-008","type":"COBRA Required","field":"COBRA Status","severity":"critical","employees":["E015"],"msg":"E015 terminated - COBRA notification letter not generated","resolution":"Generate COBRA election notice immediately. Deadline: 44 days from termination date Feb 28."}]},{"id":"INT-04","name":"Lattice Performance","status":"healthy","lastSync":"2024-03-01T12:00:00","errors":1,"impacted":1,"errors_list":[{"id":"ERR-009","type":"Stale Review","field":"Review Date","severity":"medium","employees":["E003"],"msg":"E003 last review date Aug 2023 - over 6 months without review","resolution":"Schedule performance review with manager Sarah Kim. Update Lattice review cycle settings."}]},{"id":"INT-05","name":"Glint Engagement","status":"healthy","lastSync":"2024-02-28T23:00:00","errors":0,"impacted":0,"errors_list":[]}]}'
